items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and d…
items.title_zh: X 发帖：Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and d…
items.summary: Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and down at the moment apart from Mercedes. They're kind of a constant challenge at the very front. Austria was a little bit hard to read for us. Qualifying we thought we'd be a bit stronger, in the race maybe we thought we'd be a bit worse. Ferrari we thought would be quite a lot stronger on Sunday than they were. Redbull or Max at least, was a lot quicker than we thought he'd be. It's changing a lot at the moment from track to track with upgrades for everybody. Difficult to read but I think we should be somewhere at the front, where exactly, I don't know. But we're still missing that final step to really challenge for wins. As long as we put our best foot forward, I think we're in the running for hopefully podiums, but we'll have to find out!"
items.summary_zh: Q: What are your expectations? "Um, difficult to know. I think everyone's a little bit up and down at the moment apart from Mercedes. They're kind of a constant challenge at the very front. Austria was a little bit hard to read for us. Qualifying we thought we'd be a bit stronger, in the race maybe we thought we'd be a bit worse. Ferrari we thought would be quite a lot stronger on Sunday than they were. Redbull or Max at least, was a lot quicker than we thought he'd be. It's changing a lot at the moment from track to track with upgrades for everybody. Difficult to read but I think we should be somewhere at the front, where exactly, I don't know. But we're still missing that final step to really challenge for wins. As long as we put our best foot forward, I think we're in the running for hopefully podiums, but we'll have to find out!"

items.title: X repost from @laurogeitabat: Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it doesn't really mean much t…
items.title_zh: X 转帖：Piastri 相关：Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it do…
items.summary: Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it doesn't really mean much to me. Max obviously doesn't need to be spoken about much in terms of his talent. I've got a contract in place. I've had multiple reassurances that the team are very happy with me and I'm very happy with the team. For me I'm very happy where I am, happy with the situation I'm in and just trying to continue the success we've had in the last few years."
items.summary_zh: Oscar was asked about the max rumours and what it means for him: "it doesn't really mean much to me. Max obviously doesn't need to be spoken about much in terms of his talent. I've got a contract in place. I've had multiple reassurances that the team are very happy with me and I'm very happy with the team. For me I'm very happy where I am, happy with the situation I'm in and just trying to continue the success we've had in the last few years."

items.summary_zh: 1) thermal shift (by nick thomm) - inspired by the energy, thermal dynamics and motion of racing 2) phase grid (by j. demsky) - inspired by movement and transformation 3) velocity (by david nott) - inspired by oscar's driving style, speed, momentum and precision
